name: OpenClaw AI-agent workshop should not alert as robotics in NYC
notes: This previously alerted as robotics_nyc with confidence 0.78, but the linked event is a software AI-agent workshop rather than robotics, hardware, embodied AI, or physical-world automation.

messages.text: My friend openclaw workshop is next week if you want to learn about it, I will be there if you want to meet and learn about that. Its free, just a deposit that is refunded post event to make sure there is no no show! https://example.com/openclaw-workshop
